title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Central Laws (Extension to Arunachal Pradesh) Act, 1993. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st July, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 491(E), dated1st July, 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
